<p class="uo-runic" title="In Mani Ylem">In Mani Ylem</p>

<span class="uo-ascii">In Mani Ylem</span> — the words of power, shown above in the Britannian runic alphabet and here in the Ultima Online game typeface. First Circle Magery.

Conjures a random item of food directly into the caster's backpack.

## Casting requirements

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Circle | 1 (First) |
| Mana cost | 4 |
| Minimum Magery | 0 (0% success below this) |
| Magery for 100% success | 20 |
| Reagents | Garlic, Ginseng, Mandrake Root |
| Words of power | <span class="uo-runic">In Mani Ylem</span> &nbsp; <span class="uo-ascii">In Mani Ylem</span> |

Casting from a scroll lowers the effective circle by two, reducing the skill
requirement (mana cost is unchanged).
